summary: Iteration 10 frontend-only verification of (a) Steve Dapper light theme, (b) Footer light theme, (c) VideoWithLoader shimmer + spinner overlay + IntersectionObserver lazy-load + preload='metadata'. All requested changes verified on the live preview URL. No console errors detected.

verification_results.dapper_section_light: PASS - data-testid=home-dapper-section has class 'bg-gradient-to-b from-white via-blue-50/30 to-white' and id='professor'. The 3 IT blocks (Fondamenta Accademiche, Sviluppo del Metodo, Pratica Applicata) render correctly.
verification_results.footer_light: PASS - footer has class 'bg-gradient-to-b from-white via-blue-50/30 to-white border-t border-slate-200'. Brand wordmark uses blue gradient. Certification cards are white with slate-200 borders.
verification_results.newsletter_input_light: PASS - input has 'bg-white border border-slate-300 text-slate-900 placeholder-slate-400'.
verification_results.video_shimmer_loader: PASS - 4 shimmer overlays (.vf-shimmer) and 4 'Loading video' labels present in DOM (one per VideoWithLoader instance). Spinner uses border-t-blue-600 + animate-spin. Confirmed visually in hero screenshot showing 'LOADING VIDEO' with circular spinner before the video plays.
verification_results.shimmer_keyframe_defined: PASS - '@keyframes shimmer' is present in the inline <style> block in HomePage.jsx.
verification_results.preload_metadata: PASS - hero video has preload='metadata' attribute (verified at runtime).
verification_results.lazy_load_intersection_observer: PASS - Initial DOM contains only ~2 <video> elements (hero + nearby). After scrolling progressively to method / integration / dapper sections, total videos rose to 4 (one per data-testid: home-hero-video, home-method-video, home-integration-video, home-dapper-video). Method/integration/dapper <video> elements are not in DOM until intersection occurs (rootMargin=200px).
verification_results.console_errors: PASS - 0 console errors detected on initial load and during scroll-based lazy video loading.
verification_results.final_cta_modals: PASS - home-cta-corporate-button opens CorporateQuoteForm modal (visually confirmed in mobile screenshot: 'Richiedi Preventivo Personalizzato'). home-cta-individual-button opens BookingFormModal. Hero CTAs (home-hero-cta-corporate / home-hero-cta-individual) exist and are wired.
verification_results.data_testids_intact: PASS - All previous-iteration data-testids verified present: home-hero-section, home-credibility-strip, home-trusted-section, home-what-section, home-process-section, home-audience-section, home-integration-section, home-programmes-section, home-dapper-section, home-final-cta-section, plus all 4 video testids.
verification_results.language_toggle: PARTIAL - Default language is IT (verified). Clicking the visible 'IT' label button did not immediately swap copy to EN in the test (likely opens a dropdown rather than toggling directly). However Dapper section remained light after the click and IT copy renders correctly with the new light theme. Recommend manual confirmation of the EN-side dapper render.

minor_observations: Modal open detection via [role="dialog"] returned 0 — the CorporateQuoteForm and BookingFormModal modals do not set role='dialog' on their root container. The modals do open and are functional (verified via screenshot); this is a minor accessibility/testability nit, not a blocker.
Language toggle (IT button) appears to open a picker rather than a direct toggle in this build; not a regression for iteration 10 scope.
critical_code_review_comments: VideoWithLoader is well-isolated and reusable. IntersectionObserver disconnects after first intersection — good. preload='metadata' correctly trades off bandwidth vs. perceived speed.
The Dapper section has correct light theming (slate-900 titles, slate-600 body, white cards, blue-600 icons).
Footer correctly converted to light theme; emerald/cyan accents replaced by blue-600 throughout.
Consider adding role='dialog' + aria-modal='true' to BookingFormModal and CorporateQuoteForm root containers for a11y and easier automated testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 verified end-to-end on https://vocal-members-pro.preview.emergentagent.com/. Key takeaways for next agent: (1) Modals don't have role='dialog' root attribute — use inner-text or testids instead. (2) Language toggle button label = current language (click may show dropdown). (3) VideoWithLoader uses IntersectionObserver with rootMargin=200px — videos render lazily; expect 1-2 <video> tags on initial load and up to 4 after scrolling through all sections. (4) Default language is IT, but EN copy is fully wired in COPY.en object inside HomePage.jsx.
